item.name: api
v1
battles
{id}
phases
Executes the next battle phase for a battle using an equipped move.
Returns the ordered history of recorded battle phases.
Returns the current state and recorded history of a battle.
Creates a battle between exactly two playable pokemon instances.
damage-calculations
Calculates the damage a move would deal from one playable pokemon instance to another.
system
Returns technical metadata about the API host.
moves
{id}
pokemon-species
Returns the base pokemon species that can learn a given move.
Updates a move in the catalog.
Deletes a move from the catalog when it has no active dependencies.
Returns the detail of a move.
Creates a move in the catalog.
Returns the move catalog exposed by the API.
pokemons
{id}
learnable-moves
Associates or removes learnable moves for a base pokemon species.
Returns the learnable move catalog for a base pokemon species.
Updates a base pokemon species in the catalog.
Deletes a base pokemon species from the catalog when it has no active dependencies.
Returns the detail of a base pokemon species.
Creates a base pokemon species in the catalog.
Returns the base pokemon species catalog exposed by the API.
my-pokemons
{id}
equipped-moves
Returns the moves currently equipped by a playable pokemon instance.
Updates the mutable state of a playable pokemon instance.
Deletes a playable pokemon instance when it is not used by active dependencies.
Returns the detail of a playable pokemon instance.
Creates a playable pokemon instance based on a base species.
Returns the playable pokemon instances registered in the API.
